```tsx
const initialState = {
  phase: "idle",
  minutesLeft: 25,
  secondsLeft: 0,
  rounds: 0,
};

function view(state) {
  const mins = String(state.minutesLeft).padStart(2, "0");
  const secs = String(state.secondsLeft).padStart(2, "0");
  return (
    <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", alignItems: "center", gap: "1.5rem", padding: "2rem", backgroundColor: "var(--color-surface)", color: "var(--color-text)", fontFamily: "system-ui, sans-serif", minHeight: "100%", boxSizing: "border-box" }}>
      <h2 style={{ margin: 0, fontSize: "1.25rem", fontWeight: 600 }}>
        {state.phase === "break" ? "Break" : "Focus"}
      </h2>
      <div style={{ fontSize: "4rem", fontWeight: 700, letterSpacing: "0.05em", fontVariantNumeric: "tabular-nums" }}>
        {mins}:{secs}
      </div>
      <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: "0.75rem" }}>
        {state.phase === "idle" || state.phase === "break" ? (
          <button data-action="start" style={{ padding: "0.5rem 1.5rem", backgroundColor: "var(--color-accent)", color: "var(--color-text)", border: "none", borderRadius: "0.375rem", cursor: "pointer", fontSize: "1rem" }}>
            Start
          </button>
        ) : (
          <button data-action="pause" style={{ padding: "0.5rem 1.5rem", backgroundColor: "var(--color-accent)", color: "var(--color-text)", border: "none", borderRadius: "0.375rem", cursor: "pointer", fontSize: "1rem" }}>
            Pause
          </button>
        )}
        <button data-action="reset" style={{ padding: "0.5rem 1.5rem", backgroundColor: "transparent", color: "var(--color-text)", border: "1px solid var(--color-text)", borderRadius: "0.375rem", cursor: "pointer", fontSize: "1rem", opacity: 0.7 }}>
          Reset
        </button>
      </div>
      <p style={{ margin: 0, fontSize: "0.875rem", opacity: 0.6 }}>
        Rounds completed: {state.rounds}
      </p>
    </div>
  );
}

const actionSpec = "state is { phase: 'idle'|'running'|'paused'|'break', minutesLeft: number, secondsLeft: number, rounds: number }; 'start': set phase to 'running'; 'pause': set phase to 'paused'; 'reset': return to initial state (phase idle, 25 min, 0 sec, rounds unchanged); 'tick': decrement secondsLeft by 1, when 0 decrement minutesLeft, when both 0 and phase=running set phase='break' and minutesLeft=5, when both 0 and phase=break increment rounds and set minutesLeft=25 phase=idle";

export { initialState, view, actionSpec };
```
